since_last: 7% of 100 AI names green; Powering AI leads -1.22%; AI bubble risk 50 Neutral.

cards.headline: The tape: broad selling, 7% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX -0.51% · BTC -1.25% · Gold +0.36% · Nasdaq100 -1.62%. 7% of 100 AI names are green — broad selling. Powering AI is doing the heavy lifting at -1.22%.

cards.headline: Powering AI leads, AI Chips & Compute lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is Powering AI at -1.22%; weakest is AI Chips & Compute at -3.34%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: ISRG is the standout at -11.38%
cards.body: Leaders: SO +1.75%, PEG +0.49%, MGNI +0.20%, ETR +0.11%, DLR +0.09%. Laggards: ISRG -11.38%, SYNA -5.66%, AMAT -4.91%, LRCX -4.90%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) -3.35% at $126.72
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is -3.35% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 50 — Neutral
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 50/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
